programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes it to the house in nearby Lancaster, Calif., while Dave takes advantage of being so close to Ivy; Justin pushes all of Rene's buttons and comes out ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A three-ring circus erupts when the buyers head to Irvine, Calif.; Darrell speculates that Dave has gone broke.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: There are roses for some and thorns for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, Calif.; Dave arrives with unanticipated optimism, but that doesn't stop him from stirring up trouble; Ivy has to pound unfamiliar pavement.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily deals with an all-male day in Paramount, Calif.; Justin seeks Ivy's guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts; Kenny speaks up during the auction, and quickly regrets it.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders get up early to grab buys in Perris, Calif.; Dave's excessive bluster creates tension; Mary tries to stay upbeat; Ivy stays sharp and looks for a score.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders descend upon Laguna Hills, Calif.; Dave scores a furniture unit; Jarrod and Brandi stroll down memory lane.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: On a full moon, a stranger sets up an erotic photo shoot on a neighbor's porch; two Floridian landscapers are shocked when a woman begins hurling insults; a tenant becomes incensed by his landlord's unannounced visits and decides to lock her out.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A New Orleans man trims branches off his neighbors' hedge so he can park his car in the street, sparking their fury; neighbors in California take exception to workers climbing over their fence to fix a blocked sewer pipe.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman films a shocking altercation between her neighbors in their apartment building parking lot, which ends in some truly dangerous driving; the story of a nurse who saved her neighbor's life.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A newly-married couple face a hostile neighborhood when building a tiny home in Missouri out of shipping containers; brawling neighbors in a New York bodega leaves one with a broken jaw; in Alabama, a man claims the neighbors stole his dog.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A next-door neighbor vandalizes a woman's car; a nanny nabs a porch pirate trying to purloin a package; a good Samaritan tries to rescue a neighbor who is left hanging from the roof; a food delivery man deals with a customer's nasty neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Accusations fly in a California neighborhood when pickleball equipment goes missing; neighbors in New York City throw eggs at a man for his extreme views; a homeowner wades through his options as his apartment slowly fills with water.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Twin Creeks, Ind., two couples take on the neighbor who is making their lives a misery; an Arizona family wakes in horror to discover an intruder in their home.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a skateboarder dodges a young child playing in a Louisiana skate park, he takes out his frustrations on the kid's parents; a neighborhood firework display causes sparks to fly between two neighbors in Orlando.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a man standing in his own driveway is questioned by a neighbor about why he's there; in South Carolina's Blue Ridge Mountains, a tense balcony dispute escalates when a husband steps in to defend his family; and in Michigan, a mother who feels constantly watched decides to fight back, drawing plenty of attention.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A man tries to solve a long-running property line dispute by destroying his neighbor's building; a whole neighborhood runs for cover when a fireworks celebration goes bad; a father finds a new way to lay down the law on his daughter's date.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A Connecticut homeowner is pushed to the brink by a self-proclaimed pastor who has occupied his property for nearly two years; after restricting bathroom access and repeatedly clashing with the owner and other tenants, Flash and his team are called in to confront this savvy squatter, who has an unholy grip on the house.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young Washington couple is shocked to find a man claiming tenancy in the home they're renovating; as mysterious packages addressed to dozens of names flood the property, Flash suspects something much bigger is brewing.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Patricia has called her Washington home her sanctuary for more than 60 years. But after the devastating loss of her son and a medical emergency forced her away, the house was overrun by rats and squatters. Now, with decades of memories being threatened, Flash is racing to help Patricia take back the home and the life that's being stolen from her.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: An upstate New York couple is locked out of their own home by squatters who complain about a mouse infestation — but still refuse to leave; when the occupants allegedly forge a lease, the dispute escalates from a property battle to a potential criminal claim; but Flash and his team have one mission: reclaim the home for its rightful owners.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a man claims possession of a cherished family lake house in New York, Flash and his team race to reclaim it. Convinced he knows the law, the combative squatter refuses to budge, escalating tensions at every turn. With Flash going undercover next door, can he gather the intel he needs to outsmart the squatter and take back the home?

programme.title: The Piano

programme.title: Sheroes

programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back on one of their most turbulent builds ever - Amber and Martin's working from home transformation in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody has Thanksgiving dinner with Kelly's family and realises that his father-in-law is having an affair. The rest of the gang celebrate at Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: .. Whoa, Whoa, Whoa: Carla's love-hate relationship with John Hill gets out of hand when a passionate encounter gives him a heart attack. Cliff has a new neighbour.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca's dad tries to persuade her to move back into the family home in San Diego. Woody and Kelly can't agree about where to live.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After hurting themselves during a tryst, Ray and Debra say they fell down the stairs. But when Frank gets hurt doing some DIY, they begin to feel guilty.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie's good intentions backfire when they try to drive Robert back into Amy's arms - and find out that Amy and Gianni are hitting it off.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: While the Barones watch their sons play basketball, Ray notices that Geoff is having trouble getting the hang of the game.

programme.title: Matt Allwright

programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
